welcome.subtitle: Master debugging step by step. Learn each concept, then hunt the bugs.
welcome.locked_msg: Complete all puzzles in Level {{level}} to unlock

debugger.read_code_btn: I've read the code — Find the Bug!
debugger.step1_desc: Read through the code carefully. Each line has a hint explaining what it does. Think about what the code should produce vs what it actually does.
debugger.step2_desc: Something is wrong with this code. Look at the expected vs actual output below the code. When you're ready, click "Reveal Bug" to see which line is faulty.
debugger.step3_desc: The buggy line is highlighted in red. Choose the correct fix from the options below.
debugger.bug_fixed_desc: The code now produces the correct result.
